title: The Evolution of Blockchain Technology
description: A chronological timeline showing the key milestones and foundational concepts that led to the development of modern blockchain technology.
elements: 1991: Stuart Haber & W. Scott Stornetta propose a cryptographically secured chain of blocks
1998: Nick Szabo conceptualizes 'Bit Gold', a decentralized digital currency
2008: Satoshi Nakamoto publishes the Bitcoin Whitepaper
2009: Genesis Block of Bitcoin is mined, launching the first blockchain
2013: Vitalik Buterin proposes Ethereum, introducing smart contracts
relationships: Chronological progression leading to the creation of Bitcoin
Each event builds upon previous cryptographic and conceptual work
Ethereum expands blockchain's utility beyond currency into programmable contracts
